# Local-First Workbench Kit

A provider-agnostic toolkit for prompt protocols and local-first workflows.

## Files to read

- README.md — Project overview
- packages/prompt-executor/README.md — Protocol executor documentation
- packages/contracts/README.md — Schema documentation
- CHANGELOG.md — Release notes

## Key entry points

- `packages/prompt-executor/src/index.ts` — Main API surface
- `packages/contracts/src/index.ts` — Validation schemas
- `docs/content/_index.md` — Documentation index

## About prompt-executor

Runtime for executing prompt protocols. No LLM client included. You bring the adapter (Anthropic SDK, OpenAI, etc.). Zero dependencies.

## About contracts

Zod schemas for validation. Provides runtime checks for sessions, steps, and evaluations.

## Monorepo structure

- pnpm workspace
- Shared TypeScript base config
- Two independent packages:
  - `@thiagoprazeres/prompt-executor` — Zero-dep executor
  - `@thiagoprazeres/contracts` — Zod schemas

## Build & test

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm build
pnpm test
pnpm typecheck
```

## Version

0.0.1 (Fase -2.1, pre-stable)

## Repository

https://github.com/thiagoprazeres/local-first-workbench-kit
